text:
Okay, imagine this. There's a little snow-covered town nestled deeply in a valley surrounded by mountains that look like towering cats. In this sleepy little place lives Oliver, a curious puppy with big ears and an endless curiosity.

One chilly afternoon, Oliver discovers a hidden treasure chest at the old mine just outside town. Excited, he digs around until he pulls out a globe filled with colorful stars. He begins to explore.

First, he barks excitedly at all the stars. Then, he starts naming each one, dreaming up stories about where they've been. Next, he wants to know how far away they are. Hoping to uncover the origin of these distant novae, he starts hopping.

The first stop is Polaris. Oliver stops to look as stars swim in circles around it. He hops a bit further and lands on Sirius, laughing when he imagines a tiny Sirius Black lecturing Orion about something. His adventure guides him to Pleasure Island, where the stars are music
